steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The motorman is frustrated (chafed) about the laborer's difficult lot. He then "registered discontent." The word "registered" must describe how his internal frustration becomes externally visible — the target meaning is to show or to display.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘Bypassed’: Recording discontent suggests writing it down or logging it, not expressing it outwardly. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘Enrolled’: Reporting implies communicating to someone formally — not how emotion is expressed on a face or body. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘Valued’: Noting is a mental act of observing, not a visible expression of feeling. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘Displayed’: Displayed means made visible or evident — exactly how frustration shows on someone's face or behavior. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
